description: A bright seascape depicting a white sailboat heeling in the wind on a vivid blue ocean under a wide sky streaked with wispy clouds. Three or four figures sit aboard the vessel, one standing and gripping the rigging. A single large white sail catches the wind. To the left, a dark buoy or small anchor float bobs on the gentle swells. The palette is dominated by luminous blues and whites, with touches of warm skin tones on the sailors. The horizon is low, giving the sky and sea expansive presence.
